mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_stock_order WHERE deleted = 0
AND (order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stock_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR audit_status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, order_no, stock_direction, stock_type, supplier_id, supplier_name, maker, purchase_amount, retail_amount, operator, audit_status, audit_at, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_stock_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND stock_direction = #{stockDirection}
AND (order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stock_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR audit_status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND stock_type IN ('PURCHASE_IN', '采购入库')
AND stock_type IN ('RETURN_IN', '退货入库')
AND stock_type IN ('OTHER_IN', '其他入库', '其它入库')
AND stock_type IN ('DEPARTMENT_OUT', '科室领药', '门诊领用')
AND stock_type IN ('DAMAGE_OUT', '报损出库')
AND stock_type IN ('PURCHASE_RETURN_OUT', '采购退货', '采购出库')
AND stock_type = #{stockType}
AND (audit_status IS NULL OR audit_status IN ('PENDING', 'PENDING_AUDIT', '未通过', '未审核'))
AND audit_status IN ('APPROVED', 'AUDIT_APPROVED', '审核通过')
AND audit_status IN ('REJECTED', 'AUDIT_REJECTED', '审核未通过')
AND audit_status = #{auditStatus}
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_stock_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND stock_direction = #{stockDirection}
AND (order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR stock_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR supplier_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR audit_status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND stock_type IN ('PURCHASE_IN', '采购入库')
AND stock_type IN ('RETURN_IN', '退货入库')
AND stock_type IN ('OTHER_IN', '其他入库', '其它入库')
AND stock_type IN ('DEPARTMENT_OUT', '科室领药', '门诊领用')
AND stock_type IN ('DAMAGE_OUT', '报损出库')
AND stock_type IN ('PURCHASE_RETURN_OUT', '采购退货', '采购出库')
AND stock_type = #{stockType}
AND (audit_status IS NULL OR audit_status IN ('PENDING', 'PENDING_AUDIT', '未通过', '未审核'))
AND audit_status IN ('APPROVED', 'AUDIT_APPROVED', '审核通过')
AND audit_status IN ('REJECTED', 'AUDIT_REJECTED', '审核未通过')
AND audit_status = #{auditStatus}

SELECT id, order_no, stock_direction, stock_type, supplier_id, supplier_name, maker, purchase_amount, retail_amount, operator, audit_status, audit_at, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_stock_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_stock_order (order_no, stock_direction, stock_type, supplier_id, supplier_name, maker, purchase_amount, retail_amount, operator, audit_status, audit_at, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{stockDirection}, #{stockType}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{maker}, #{purchaseAmount}, #{retailAmount}, #{operator}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditAt}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_stock_order
order_no = #{orderNo}, stock_direction = #{stockDirection}, stock_type = #{stockType}, supplier_id = #{supplierId}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, maker = #{maker}, purchase_amount = #{purchaseAmount}, retail_amount = #{retailAmount}, operator = #{operator}, audit_status = #{auditStatus}, audit_at = #{auditAt}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
